headlines.description: — Tyrese Haliburton hardly resembled the player whose peers have deemed him overrated.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tyrese Haliburton ignites closing run for Pacers, who stun Cavs 121-112 in Game 1 of East semis

events.name: Golden State Warriors at Houston Rockets

headlines.description: — Buddy Hield became an unlikely playoff hero for the Golden State Warriors, leading the team early in Game 7 against the Houston Rockets before Stephen Curry took over late.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stephen Curry and Buddy Hield lead Warriors past Rockets 103-89 in Game 7
